welcomeTagline: Your privacy-first, encrypted bill splitting app.
welcomeWhyBody: Splitting bills with friends should be simple, and stay between you and your friends. Partage is end-to-end encrypted, works offline, syncs across devices when you want, and never asks you to create an account.
welcomeFeatureActivityLog: Full activity log, nothing is lost
welcomeFeatureInstallable: Installs as an app on any device
welcomeFeatureOpenSource: Open source, no ads, no tracking
welcomeScreenshotActivity: Full activity log with edit history
welcomeScreenshotInvite: Invite by link or QR code
welcomeDetailFilter: Filter entries by person, category, currency, or date
welcomeDetailBackup: Free CSV export and full JSON backup
welcomeDetailPaymentMethods: Payment hints: IBAN, Wero, Lydia, Revolut, PayPal, Venmo, BTC, ADA
welcomeDetailMembers: Add virtual members, merge them, retire without losing history
welcomeDetailEntryTypes: Expenses, transfers, and income as first-class entries
welcomeDetailHistory: Soft-delete with restore and field-level edit history
welcomeDetailNoLimits: No daily limits, no caps, no ads
welcomeHowItWorks: Your expenses are stored locally on your device and encrypted before syncing. Only group members with the shared key can read the data. No account needed.
welcomeFundingBody: Partage is free, open source, and ad-free. Running the sync server costs a few cents per active user per month. If you find the app useful, please consider chipping in.
notFoundMessage: The page you are looking for does not exist.
aboutDescription: A fully encrypted, local-first bill-splitting application for trusted groups.
balanceNoEntries: No expenses yet. Add your first entry to see balances here.
inviteLinkHint: Share this invite link in trusted channels only. It contains the group encryption key to participate and read the group history.
joinGroupNameTaken: This name is already used by another member.
toastAlreadyInGroup: You are already in this group.
homeNoGroups: No groups yet. Create your first one!
newGroupCurrencyHint: Used as the default currency for expenses in this group.
fieldInvalidUrl: Must start with http:// or https://
newEntryDescriptionHint: A short description of the expense.
newEntryPayerMismatch: Payer amounts must add up to the total.
newEntryNoPayerError: Please select at least one payer.
newEntryBeneficiariesHint: Select the members who benefit from this expense.
newEntrySelectBoth: Please select both a sender and a receiver.
newEntryDefaultCurrencyAmountHint: Equivalent amount in the group's default currency ({currency}).
newEntryRateError: Couldn't fetch the rate. Enter it manually or check xe.com.
newEntryAttachmentsHint: Take a photo, share it to your cloud storage, then copy the link and paste it here.
newEntryExactMismatch: Exact amounts must add up to the total.
newEntrySameFromTo: Sender and receiver must be different.
newEntryIncomeDescriptionHint: A short description of the income.
newEntryIncomeBeneficiariesHint: Select the members who should receive a share of this income.
missingGroupMessage: You don't have this group locally. Open an invitation link (with its key after the #) to join it.
mergeStep1Subtitle: All expenses and settlement preferences from the retiring member will move to the kept member.
mergeNoOtherMember: There is no other member to merge into.
mergeStep2Subtitle: Review every effect, then type the name to confirm.
mergeBannerRecommended: Recommended direction: a virtual placeholder is being merged into a real member.
mergeBannerSwapHint: {source} is a real member but {target} is virtual. Consider swapping.
mergeBannerBothReal: {source} is a real member who has joined with a device. Make sure you mean to retire that one rather than the other.
mergeSelfTransfersDeletedCount: {count} transfers will become self-to-self and be deleted
mergeAuthorshipNote: Original authorship of each entry is preserved. Only who paid and who benefited is rewritten.
mergeIrreversibleWarning: This will create {count} events and cannot be undone except by editing each entry back by hand.
mergeNothingToRewrite: Nothing to rewrite. {source} will simply be retired.
mergeConfirmPlaceholder: Type the name to enable the merge button
memberAddNameTaken: This name is already used by another member.
editMetadataProfileFillDescription: Pick which fields to copy into the form. Nothing leaves this device until you submit.
editMetadataProfileSaveDescription: Pick which fields to remember on this device. Unselected fields keep their previously saved value.
editMetadataProfileSaveEmpty: Nothing to save: fill in some fields first.
groupRemoveWarning: This will permanently remove this group from your device. This cannot be undone.
settlementPreferencesHint: Choose who you prefer to pay first. It is recommended to leave this untouched for a better settlement plan for the whole group.
settlementNoPaymentMethods: {name} hasn't set up a payment method yet. You can add one from the Group tab.
homeImportHint: Imports a group previously exported from Partage.
splitwiseImportInfo: Import a group from a Splitwise group CSV: only history and balances, exact split details are lost in the Splitwise CSV export.
splitwiseImportHint: Review the details below, then create the group.
splitwiseImportRatesHint: Splitwise tracks each currency separately. Pick one rate per other currency to convert balances into the default currency.
splitwiseImportParseError: Could not read this file as a Splitwise CSV export.
importErrorAlreadyExists: This group already exists on your device.
entryDeleteWarning: This will mark the entry as deleted.
entryRestoreWarning: This will restore the deleted entry.
pwaInstallPrompt: Install Partage for a better experience
pwaInstallHintIos: Install Partage: tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”
pwaInstallHintMac: Install Partage: click Share, then “Add to Dock”
pwaInstallHintAndroid: Install Partage: open the browser menu, then “Add to Home screen”
pwaInstallHintIosWebview: To install Partage, first open this page directly in Safari (not in this in-app browser), then add it to your home screen.
pwaAlreadyInstalled: Partage is already installed, open it from your home screen
pwaJustInstalled: Partage installed! Open it from your home screen for the best experience.
readOnlyBanner: Read-only mode. You are not a member of this group
aboutUsageHint: Estimated server cost based on your sync activity. Measured locally on your device, nothing is tracked remotely.
aboutResetConfirm: This will reset all usage statistics. This cannot be undone.
aboutFundingBody: That number above is roughly what your usage costs to run on the server. Partage has no ads and no paid tier. If you can, please chip in to keep it running for everyone.
homeNotificationsHint: This is a global setting to activate notifications in the app. Per-group Push notifications are configured inside each group.
newGroupVirtualMembersHint: Add the names of other members of this group.
groupEditInfoEmpty: Edit group name or add a description
errorLogPrivacyNotice: This debug report contains information about your groups (names, members, settings). By copying and sending it to the developer, you acknowledge this data will be visible to them.
